name: Tee Time Social
about: Tee Time Social is an indoor golf simulator venue in Hales Corners, Wisconsin, offering a social sports bar atmosphere with state-of-the-art golf technology. The facility features multiple simulator bays where players can access over 1,900 world-famous golf courses, with options for both casual play and competitive leagues. The venue combines golfing with a full-service bar and restaurant, serving craft cocktails, local craft beers, and a menu of artisan pizza, wings, and appetizers. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with different rates for weekdays and weekends, and an option to book online. The venue is designed to be a year-round destination for golfers, regardless of weather, offering a welcoming environment for both individuals and groups.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to over 1,900 world-famous golf courses with state-of-the-art simulator technology
Social atmosphere combining golf with craft cocktails and a curated food menu
Flexible booking options and hourly pricing for both individuals and groups
Hosts regular leagues, tournaments, and special events for all skill levels
Available year-round, rain or shine, for consistent practice and play

food_and_drink.notes: Artisan pizza, wings, pretzels, and appetizers prepared fresh in an Alto-Shaam Vector oven
Full bar with premium spirits, local craft beers, and expertly crafted cocktails with golf-themed names

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, players are expected to bring their own golf clubs to use with the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed. The venue offers a full menu of food and beverages for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It typically takes 2 hours for 4 golfers to complete 18 holes, while 2 golfers can play in 1.5 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Time Social is kid-friendly and hosts events like birthday parties and family-friendly leagues.
